summary: This is a brief announcement post for Episode 31 of the Stack Overflow podcast, recorded around Thanksgiving 2008. Joel lists the topics covered in the episode with Jeff Atwood, including math, status reports, the economic downturn, office space, SQL parameters, and programming slumps. The post serves purely as a pointer to the podcast episode hosted on the Stack Overflow blog. There is no substantive written argument or analysis in the post itself.
key_points: Announcement post for Stack Overflow Podcast Episode 31, the Thanksgiving edition
Topics discussed include the 2008 economic downturn, the business case for nice office space, SQL parameters, and programming slumps
The post contains essentially no written content beyond a topic list and link
money_quotes: Jeff and I discuss math, status reports, the economic downturn, the business case for nice office space, SQL parameters, programming slumps, and a whole lot more.
key_insight: This is a minimal podcast announcement post with no substantive written content to analyze.
